Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT bs."in.comstock_building_type" AS comstock_building_type, count(DISTINCT (bs.bldg_id, bs."in.nhgis_tract_gisjoin", bs.state)) AS sample_count, (count(DISTINCT (bs.bldg_id, bs."in.nhgis_tract_gisjoin", bs.state)) * sum(bs.weight)) / CAST(sum(1) AS DECIMAL) AS units_count, sum(1) / CAST(count(DISTINCT (bs.bldg_id, bs."in.nhgis_tract_gisjoin", bs.state)) AS DECIMAL) AS rows_per_sample, sum((comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_ts_by_state."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption" - comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_ts_by_state."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption") * bs.weight) AS elec_minus_gas FROM comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_ts_by_state JOIN comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_by_state_and_county_parquet AS bs ON bs.bldg_id = comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_ts_by_state.bldg_id AND bs.state = comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_ts_by_state.state AND bs.upgrade = 0 AND comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_ts_by_state.upgrade = 1 AND comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_ts_by_state.state IN ('CO', 'NM') AND (comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_ts_by_state.bldg_id, comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_ts_by_state.state) IN (SELECT bs.bldg_id, bs.state FROM comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_by_state_and_county_parquet AS bs WHERE bs.upgrade IN (1) AND bs.applicability = true GROUP BY bs.bldg_id, bs.state HAVING count(distinct(bs.upgrade)) = 1) AND bs.state IN ('CO', 'NM') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/e13c369381b809de6311bed2a6cb517705843c7f846fdc247209e92e706d99a9/7a0b672d-caba-457c-8f03-3aaf7bf49a57/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
